_doc.description: Disler-compatible webhook config. Mentat emits a JSON envelope per insight to every endpoint that whitelists the hook_event_type.

fields.enabled: bool — master kill-switch. v0.2 ships with this false so installing v0.2 over v0.1 is a no-op until the user opts in.
fields.max_payload_bytes: int — bodies larger than this are truncated to a stub envelope before signing. Default 16384.

endpoints[].url: str — full POST target. HTTPS recommended.
endpoints[].secret_env: str — env var name that holds the shared HMAC secret. Mentat sets the X-Mentat-Signature header to 'sha256=<hex>' over the canonical JSON body.
endpoints[].events_filter: list[str] — hook_event_type whitelist (e.g. ['reward_signal','state_transition']). Empty list = pass everything.

envelope.hook_event_type: Direct map from state_machine.insights.InsightType.value — see state_machine/insights.py.

headers.X-Mentat-Signature: sha256=<hex HMAC of the request body using secret_env>
headers.X-Idempotency-Key: sha256(session_id:seq:hook_event_type) — deterministic so duplicates dedupe receiver-side.

fields.dlq: Final failures land in ~/.mentat/webhook_dlq.sqlite. Drain with `mentat-webhooks drain`.
fields.retry: In-process: 3 attempts, exponential 1s/2s/4s. DLQ: 10min/1h/6h/24h, max 5 attempts then 'dead'.
